response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack software engineer with strong web, testing, and some low-latency systems background, but the resume shows no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU or accelerator architecture, hardware-software co-design, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — the core requirements of this Principal Performance Architect role. While the years of experience satisfy the educational path requirement, the domain mismatch is fundamental rather than a gap that could be closed quickly.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience, meeting BS + 8 years requirement
Low-latency systems work in DLang (async I/O, fibers, caching) at high request volumes
C/C++ experience on engineering measurement tooling and embedded/robotics exposure
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, silicon, or hardware architecture experience
No GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator performance analysis background
No deep neural network training/inference optimization experience
